description.value:
Brastlewark snarecrafters know that sometimes it's more advantageous to magically destroy a snare before it's triggered. Choose a magical snare within 120 feet that you crafted. The snare is automatically destroyed and each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] takes @Damage[1d6[force]|options:area-damage] damage per level of the destroyed snare with a basic @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Special If you detonate a broad snare or giant snare, choose one square that snare occupies to be the center of the emanation.
